## [​](https://docs.moralis.com/data-api/evm/wallet/overview\#overview)  Overview

The **Wallet API** provides complete wallet intelligence across all activity types - tokens, NFTs, DeFi positions, swaps, and P&L tracking.Instead of querying multiple endpoints and aggregating data yourself, the Wallet API gives you a unified view of any wallet’s holdings, history, and financial performance across chains.

* * *

## [​](https://docs.moralis.com/data-api/evm/wallet/overview\#what-is-the-wallet-api)  What Is the Wallet API?

The Wallet API lets you query everything about a wallet address:

- **Asset Holdings** \- Token balances, NFT collections, and ownership data
- **Transaction History** \- Raw and decoded transactions with human-readable labels
- **DeFi Positions** \- Protocol exposure across lending, staking, and liquidity pools
- **Financial Metrics** \- Net worth calculations and profit/loss tracking
- **Identity** \- ENS name resolution and address labels
- **Approvals** \- Token allowances granted to contracts

* * *

## [​](https://docs.moralis.com/data-api/evm/wallet/overview\#key-features)  Key Features

The Wallet API includes:

- **Decoded Transactions** \- Human-readable transaction labels and summaries
- **Multi-Chain Support** \- Query across all supported EVM chains
- **Net Worth Calculation** \- Aggregate USD value of all holdings
- **P&L Tracking** \- Realized and unrealized profit/loss per token
- **Swap History** \- DEX trading activity with token pairs and values
- **NFT Trades** \- Marketplace activity including buys, sells, and listings
- **Chain Activity** \- Identify which chains a wallet is active on

* * *

## [​](https://docs.moralis.com/data-api/evm/wallet/overview\#common-use-cases)  Common Use Cases

The Wallet API is commonly used for:

- **Portfolio Trackers**


(display holdings, value, and performance)
- **Wallet Explorers**


(transaction history and activity feeds)
- **DeFi Dashboards**


(show positions across protocols)
- **Tax Tools**


(calculate gains/losses from trading)
- **Security Apps**


(monitor approvals and revoke permissions)
- **Identity Resolution**


(resolve ENS names and wallet labels)

* * *

## [​](https://docs.moralis.com/data-api/evm/wallet/overview\#popular-endpoints)  Popular Endpoints

| Endpoint | Description |
| --- | --- |
| [Wallet History](https://docs.moralis.com/data-api/evm/wallet/wallet-history) | Complete decoded activity feed |
| [Token Balances](https://docs.moralis.com/data-api/evm/wallet/token-balances) | Current ERC-20 holdings |
| [NFT Balances](https://docs.moralis.com/data-api/evm/wallet/nft-balances) | Current NFT holdings |
| [Net Worth](https://docs.moralis.com/data-api/evm/wallet/net-worth) | Total wallet value in USD |
| [Wallet P&L](https://docs.moralis.com/data-api/evm/wallet/wallet-pnl) | Profit/loss per token |
| [Decoded Transactions](https://docs.moralis.com/data-api/evm/wallet/decoded-transactions) | Human-readable transaction data |

* * *

## [​](https://docs.moralis.com/data-api/evm/wallet/overview\#get-started)  Get Started

Explore some of the popular Wallet API endpoints:

- [Token Balances](https://docs.moralis.com/data-api/evm/wallet/token-balances)
- [NFT Balances](https://docs.moralis.com/data-api/evm/wallet/nft-balances)
- [Wallet History](https://docs.moralis.com/data-api/evm/wallet/wallet-history)
- [Net Worth](https://docs.moralis.com/data-api/evm/wallet/net-worth)
